ratings.comment:
Note: I had her for ENGL141

Her lectures were so boring that I could not focus on them. Also, all of the books she made us read were tragic and had children, dogs, and any life form conceivable being tortured in every possible way you could imagine. I didn't do some of the readings because they pissed me off so much.

Professor Wells is easily one of my favorite professors I have had at UW thus far. While the class was more work than anticipated, Wells truly cares about engaging and stimulating student interest in the content. I thoroughly enjoyed coming to discussion every week because Professor Wells is extremely intelligent and passionate about this content.

Professor Wells is so kind and intelligent and incredibly passionate about the material she lectures on. She is great at guiding your thinking, introducing new perspectives, and then enjoying the new avenues you take to explore these different perspectives. Makes you a better reader and writer overall and very stimulating class discussions!

This professor is so passionate about the course material and does a great job stimulating student interest. Participation is required, so get ready to share your opinion and answer questions in lecture and discussion. Reading assignments can be long, and they are required due to pop quizzes and because they are the basis of lecture and exams.
